goal: Freeze closeout-oriented live verification gate semantics so promotion-sensitive packages, held decisions, and unavailable evidence can be interpreted deterministically in CI and release review.
successCriteria: Gate results distinguish pass, held, block, and unavailable promotion outcomes.
Promotion-sensitive packages fail deterministically when required live evidence is missing or unavailable.
Verification artifacts expose a machine-readable promotion decision summary instead of forcing transcript-only judgment.
explicitlyOutOfScope: Adding brand-new live probes beyond the current validated matrix.
Promoting ResponseAPI or NodeMCPHost to a higher maturity level inside the gate package.
